summary: Iteration 2 targeted verification of user-requested changes for Parvathi Infra 'THE VIEW'. All six specific requests validated: (a) NO
critical_code_review_comments: WalkthroughModal.jsx: In Scene 2 the effect on scene===1 runs a v.play().catch(() => {}), which is fine for autoplay policies. But video src (HERO_VIDEO) is fetched from siteData; if that asset is missing, the 'ended' handler never fires and Scene 2 becomes a dead-end (only 'Skip to Explore' rescues). Consider a fallback timer (e.g. onError -> setScene(2)).

WalkthroughModal.jsx line ~50: jumpTo uses setTimeout(500) then document.querySelector(hash).scrollIntoView. Because Lenis smooth scrolling is enabled, this works but might race the route mount; using useEffect + useLocation-listener on the target page would be more robust.

SiteLayout.jsx exports openWalkthrough as a module-level util that dispatches a custom window event. Works, but creates a hidden coupling that isn't type-safe. A React context (WalkthroughProvider) would be cleaner.
Typewriter.jsx: caret uses inline <style>{@keyframes} scoped globally on every render — the keyframes are re-injected on every mount. Move to index.css.

TheView.jsx: em-dash '—' still appears in a JSX comment on line 242 ('MASTER PLAN — TWO PANELS'). Not rendered so harmless, but if the user's rule is 'zero em-dash anywhere in code' this violates it. innerText check on live page returns false so functional pass.

Home.jsx: The typewriter first hero paint shows a spurious NBSP + caret before deletion ('for a Discerning\xa0 Few'). Consider trimming the trailing space or using min-width on the span to avoid layout jump.
backend server.py: 201 status now returned for /leads and /brochure-request — matches iteration_1 recommendation. Good.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 6 iteration-2 change categories verified + regression: walkthrough close, whatsapp float, no video on hero, both hero walkthrough buttons)

seed_data_creation: N/A (only backend pytest which prefixes TEST_ lead docs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 changes fully verified. Preview URL https://the-view-luxury.preview.emergentagent.com. Wait ~4.5s past preloader before interacting. Walkthrough Scene1 auto-advances after 3.6s; always click walkthrough-skip-intro/walkthrough-skip-video for determinism. Scene 2 requires a small extra wait (>=1s) after skip-intro before the <video data-testid=walkthrough-video> DOM node appears due to AnimatePresence exit. Master plan non-overlap can be asserted with getBoundingClientRect (mp bottom vs pc top). No em-dash in rendered innerText on any of the 6 routes. Backend pytest updated to accept both 200 & 201 status codes.
rca of the issue: N/A — no product bugs found in this iteration.
